commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=13abe783a0d9478ab8df75f6b716703fe8f7dd46)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Feishu `sendIntervalMs` account config and inserts sleeps before subsequent reply/comment text chunks.

PR surface: Source +15. Total +15 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main has Feishu chunked reply/comment/outbound send paths and reactive retry handling, but no proactive pre-send interval configuration; I did not run a live Feishu burst test.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer review are needed because the blockers are public config semantics, cross-send-surface coverage, and missing real behavior proof.

target.title: feat(feishu): add sendIntervalMs config for outbound message rate limiting (fixes #14206)
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
